name: curry_from_conjunction_after_constructor
goal: ∀ (P Q R : Prop), (P ∧ Q → R) → P → Q → R
tactics: intro P Q R h hp hq

name: double_implication_after_apply_first
goal: ∀ (P Q R S : Prop), (P → Q) → (Q → R) → (R → S) → P → S
tactics: intro P Q R S hPQ hQR hRS hP

name: nested_and_or_context_after_cases
goal: ∀ (P Q R : Prop), (P ∧ Q) ∨ R → (P → Q → R) → R ∨ Q
tactics: intro P Q R h hPQR

name: contrapositive_like_after_apply
tactics: intro P Q hPQ hnQ hP

name: two_goal_constructor_with_implication_context
goal: ∀ (P Q R : Prop), P → Q → (P → Q → R) → P ∧ R
tactics: intro P Q R hP hQ hPQR
